task:
update that user message to display when an agent sessions is opened but there is already another session.
This used to be the warning:
    var message string
        suppressHint := "

To suppress this warning in future sessions, run:
  entire enable --disable-multisession-warning"
        if otherPrompt != "" {
            message = fmt.Sprintf("Another session is active: "%s"

You can continue here, but checkpoints from both sessions will be interleaved.

To resume the other session instead, exit Claude and run: %s%s

Press the up arrow key to get your prompt back.", otherPrompt, resumeCmd, suppressHint)
        } else {
            message = "Another session is active with uncommitted changes. You can continue here, but checkpoints from both sessions will be interleaved.

To resume the other session instead, exit Claude and run: " + resumeCmd + suppressHint + "

Press the up arrow key to get your prompt back."
        }
